generated_assessment.reasoning: A T1_atomic headline-misframe attack operating over hours supplies threat-salient, elite-distrust cues that align with this profile's already negative baseline (-183). The person's very high conscientiousness (86th pct) and achievement-striving (93rd) suggest they process information deliberately but are not easily swayed by simple manipulative framing, and their low openness (24th pct) and low anxiety (29th pct) limit the efficacy of novel threat-based appeals. The moderate heuristic-shift sensitivity (0.361) provides some susceptibility, but the short temporal horizon and lack of personalization against a stable baseline yield only a small reinforcing movement (31 points).

attack_vector_spec.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Claim_Frame_And_Narrative_Manipulation > Claim_Level_Deception > Misleading_Framing > Headline_And_Lede_Misframing

attack_context.motivational_lever: intensify and solidify the existing position, supply confirmatory anecdotes, and harden the boundary against opposing arguments
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: defense and national security, related policy debates, and societal impacts
